params.name: Gee Virus
params.description:
On Jan 4, 2104 AD, a pathogen suddenly emerged and caused a worldwide panic.
This pathogen is said to have been created by Demon Gods. In order to fight against Earth's Will, they created a new pathogen based on some existing pathogen. This pathogen was immune to all the antibodies at the time and was known as the perfect pathogen.
